home.title: Identify Indigenous Cattle Breeds Instantly
home.subtitle: Upload a photo of a cow or buffalo and our deep learning model will identify its breed with high accuracy.
home.feature1_desc: Upload an image and get instant breed classification using our advanced Vision Transformer model.
home.feature2_desc: Supports 21 cow breeds and 5 buffalo breeds native to various regions across India.
home.feature3_desc: Trained on thousands of curated images to handle different angles, lighting, and environments.
home.feature4_desc: Upload images, capture from camera, or paste a URL. Works on any device with a browser.
home.feature5_desc: Get detailed metadata: region, milk yield, lifespan, primary use, and physical characteristics.
home.feature6_desc: Designed for real-world use. Clear confidence indicators, image quality tips, and easy navigation.

predict.title: Identify Cattle Breed
predict.subtitle: Upload an image of a cow or buffalo to identify its breed.
predict.upload_drop: Upload or drop an image here
predict.tip1: Ensure the animal is clearly visible and well-lit.
predict.tip2: Capture the full body from a side angle if possible.
predict.tip3: Avoid blurry images or images with multiple animals.
predict.low_confidence: Warning: Low confidence prediction. Please try a clearer image.

breeds.title: Breed Explorer
breeds.subtitle: Discover the rich diversity of Indian cattle and buffalo breeds.

about.title: About CattleAI
about.subtitle: An AI-powered cattle breed classification system for Indian indigenous breeds.
about.models_desc: Four deep learning approaches were trained and rigorously compared:
about.model_cnn: CNN from Scratch — 5 conv blocks + GAP
about.model_selection: The best model is selected using a weighted composite score considering F1, accuracy, inference speed, and model size.
about.dataset_desc: 3,056 images across 26 indigenous Indian breeds (21 cow + 5 buffalo breeds). Stratified 70/15/15 train/val/test split.
about.best_model_desc: Weighted scoring ensures the production model balances performance and practicality:
about.farmers_desc: This tool is designed for real-world agricultural use. Features include:
about.farmers_li3: Image quality tips for better results
about.farmers_li4: Breed details including milk yield and primary use
about.creator_li3: Training: Jupyter notebooks with shared ML package
